global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a focus on promoting the SnapMeal app.
global.main_message: Promoting late-night food deals through the SnapMeal app.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient fills the background, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: SnapMeal app interface
elements.description: A simplified representation of a mobile app interface with a placeholder for food items, outlined in a light color.

elements.label: Promotional message
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Fast food, fast' with a smaller line below it that reads 'Late-night deals available'.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Late-night deals available

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button in white text that says '$4.99 Install now', designed to attract attention.

elements.label: SnapMeal logo
elements.description: The logo 'SnapMeal' appears in a bold font at the top left, colored to stand out against the background.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small circular badge in yellow with the word 'SALE' in bold black text, positioned at the top right.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' in white text on a dark background, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, SnapMeal app, late-night deals
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main message is centered, the app screenshot is in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Fast food, fast, Late-night deals available, $4.99 Install now, SnapMeal, SALE, UGC
embedding_texts.elements_text: app_screenshot: A simplified representation of a mobile app interface with a placeholder for food items, outlined in a light color. | body_text: Bold white text stating 'Fast food, fast' with a smaller line below it that reads 'Late-night deals available'. text='Fast food, fast Late-night deals available' | cta: A prominent button in white text that says '$4.99 Install now', designed to attract attention. text='$4.99 Install now' | logo: The logo 'SnapMeal' appears in a bold font at the top left, colored to stand out against the background. text='SnapMeal' | discount_badge: A small circular badge in yellow with the word 'SALE' in bold black text, positioned at the top right. text='SALE' | social_proof: A small tag labeled 'UGC' in white text on a dark background, indicating user-generated content. text='UGC'
